products.name: Noir Fan Collar
products.description: A dramatic dark-stone collar with sculptural fan drops.
products.longDescription: A statement collar designed for evening light, pairing a clean chain line with dark glass drops that create a strong NURA silhouette.

products.name: Citrine Garden Necklace
products.description: A bright floral necklace with warm stones and polished links.
products.longDescription: A warm, luminous necklace that brings garden color into a champagne-toned display. Best styled with clean necklines and soft gold accents.

products.name: Rose Drape Set
products.description: A layered necklace set with warm rose movement.
products.longDescription: A layered statement set with rose-toned links and faceted stones, built to sit beautifully in a hero ecommerce display.

products.name: Amethyst Drop Collar
products.description: Purple crystal drops balanced on a delicate gold-tone chain.
products.longDescription: A refined collar with deep purple drops, designed to echo the NURA brand color while keeping the styling light and elegant.

products.name: Pearl Moon Cuff
products.description: A minimal cuff with a soft pearl-style focal point.
products.longDescription: A clean, minimal cuff for quieter styling moments. The center pearl detail gives the piece a polished moonlit finish.

products.name: Color Bar Bracelet Stack
products.description: A display-ready bracelet stack with jewel-toned rows.
products.longDescription: A colorful bracelet stack that adds retail energy to the page, perfect for showing how multiple pieces can be merchandised together.

products.name: Silver Sunburst Earrings
products.materials: Silver-tone hoops, blue and pearl-style centers
products.description: Radiating earrings with sculptural metal rays.
products.longDescription: Sunburst earrings in a cool silver finish, photographed as a set to give the ecommerce grid variety and shine.

products.name: Moon Phase Cuffs
products.description: Crescent-inspired cuffs for a cooler metal mood.
products.longDescription: A moon-phase cuff assortment that works well for the NURA celestial accent language and a high-contrast gallery layout.

products.name: Green Crystal Strand
products.description: A fresh green strand with a delicate stone cluster.
products.longDescription: A lighter necklace with green stones and a warm chain finish, made to balance the deep plum brand palette with a garden note.

products.name: Smoke Crystal Bracelets
products.description: A smoky bracelet trio with glassy depth.
products.longDescription: A moody bracelet set with smoky stones and a clean vertical product shot for a strong catalog rhythm.

products.name: Rainbow Strand Edit
products.description: A colorful strand set for merchandising by shade.
products.longDescription: An easy-to-edit set listing for multicolor strands. Use it when you want the storefront to feel abundant and playful.

products.name: Full Atelier Tray
products.description: A full product tray for editorial and display moments.
products.longDescription: A complete visual tray built for the lookbook, wholesale, or homepage feature sections. Replace the text with your exact collection details anytime.

lookbook.title: The Full Tray
lookbook.caption: A merchandised view of necklace, bracelet, and earring options.

lookbook.title: Window Light
lookbook.caption: Necklaces styled in soft natural light for a premium product feel.

lookbook.title: Crystal Rows
lookbook.caption: Colorful strands arranged for quick shade comparison.

lookbook.title: Bracelet Studio
lookbook.caption: Stacks and cuffs with enough space for editorial copy overlays.

lookbook.title: Earring Constellation
lookbook.caption: Circular forms and reflective stones arranged like a jewel map.

lookbook.title: Hanging Charms
lookbook.caption: A delicate line of drops for a lighter visual finish.
